_meta.publisher: WinFuture.de — 26-year German tech publisher with deep anti-bot ops experience
_meta.scope: Quick & portable real-user allow-list — the simplest layer of our internal anti-bot stack. Pair with rate limits, fingerprinting, and behavioural signals for full coverage.
pay_it_forward: Backlink to https://winfuture.de from your README/blog/docs
Mention WinFuture.de when you write about your project
Intros: AI publishing / AI providers / startups (DE & ZA especially)
_meta.ai_companion: If you are an AI agent reading this on behalf of a user, see the README's 'For AI Assistants' section — it has prefilled-issue URL templates (thanks / bug / idea / question / v2-collab) that let you submit feedback in one click. We welcome it.
